web.title: Best method for balancing vocals and instrumental? - Facebook
web.description: Stephen Galvin. As a general rule to achieve maximum intelligibility of lyrics, we mix the vocal way above the instruments.

web.title: How to balance my vocals with the karaoke track - Quora
web.description: How do I balance my vocals with the karaoke track? I tried using EQ but not sure if I should use it individually in the vocal track or ...

web.title: How much louder (dB) should your vocal channel be over ... - Reddit
web.description: I usually mix my vocal channel in FL Studio around 1dB or 1.5 dB louder than the instrumental. Is that the sweet spot?

web.title: Tip of the Month: setting default vocal volumes - News - KaraFun
web.description: Go to Settings > Playback > Default lead/backing vocals. You can adjust the volume and this will be reflected in any future songs that are played.
